_comment: Placeholder. The actual schema JSON will be auto-generated by Room's KSP processor on the first build, into this directory. Filename will be `1.json`. Schema validation will then compare future versions against this v1 baseline.

entities.name: sk_word_frequency
entities.description: Per-device unigram frequency table for adaptive learning (Part 1).

entities.name: sk_bigram
entities.description: Bigram (prev word -> next word) frequencies for next-word prediction.

entities.name: sk_trigram
entities.description: Trigram (two prev words -> next word) frequencies.

entities.name: sk_user_dictionary
entities.description: User-managed custom words promoted from the learning pipeline.

entities.name: sk_config
entities.description: Single-row config table for appearance/sound/preset settings.
